creator: ian@south-border.com
text:
(In reply to Dutchman01 from comment #5
I am reminded of RedHat's RHEV and what a whole disaster that was....  And while bhyve is wonderfull for freebsd - it's not platform agnostic and AFAICT there is no import/export of things to ova/ovf ( I rely heavily on that for offline backups and quick restoration of VMS).  IDK - Maybe bhyve could suit me better for for now the best choice for my virt host is ubuntu and virtualbox.
